titleStmt.title: SII 17.672: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 672. (A.R. No. 617 of 1904.) IRUGUṈṞAPPAḶḶI, CHINGLEPUT TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab lying in a garden.

This inscription in modern characters seems to record that Vēlikkoṭṭu Śiṅgama-Nāyakkarayyaṉ arranged through Pārupatyam Śimmaṇa-Rāvuttar for the settlement of people of different castes in the maḍaviḷāgam. It was also stipulated that they should, besides contributing 1/4 paṇam to god Rāmanāthasvāmin reconsecrated in Dunmati, Tai, 6, conduct the festivals and arrange for other connected services.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
tuṉ mati varuṣam tai
mātam 6 U rāmanātacuvāmi
yāṟku puṉappiṟatiṭṭaiyā
ka maṭavaḷākam kuṭiyeṟatu
kiṟatu velikkoṭṭu ciṅ
kama nāyakkar Ayyaṉ Avarkaḷ
puṇṇiya(m)māka cimmaṇa rāvu
ttar pārapattiyattil ceyta maṭaivi
ḷākattil Ēṟiṉa kuṭi naālācātikkum yi
ṟai mācam moṉṟukku kāl paṇam vi
ḻukkāṭu tirunāḷ Ūḻiyamum paṇ
ṇikkoṇṭu yirukkavum cekku poṭ
ṭu Apiṣekam tiruviḷakkum naṭattik
koṇṭu maṭaviḷākattile Eppeṟpa
ṭṭa cuvantiramum Irāmanātacuvā
mikke kaṭṭaḷaiyiṭṭom ciṅkam nā
yakkar piṇṇiyamaāka kaṭṭi
ḷaittaiyāka Oruttar Ākilum
Akitam paṇṇiṉāl keṅkai
karaiyile mātāpitaā kaāraām
pacuvaiyum koṇ
ṇa toṣattaiyum
perakkaṭavāṉ ....
Digital edition of SII 17.672 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
